item.title: US 'plans ban' on key Chinese renewable energy tech
item.description: Federal Communications Commission said to be working on rule covering solar and battery inverters following move by EU earlier this year

item.title: Could rock-bottom German onshore wind auction prices trigger offshore-style execution risks?
item.description: Latest oversubscribed tender for wind on land led to subsidy price level that could endanger developers’ profits and make power futures key to project economics

item.title: A dearth of demo sites is hampering UK plans to unlock deepwater wind
item.description: Developers are interested, GB Energy wants to provide funding and the government is keen. But where are the demonstration sites for the first 'ODOW' foundations?

item.title: One key shortage threatens UK plans to unlock cheaper deepwater wind
item.description: Developers are interested, GB Energy wants to provide funding and the government is keen. But where are the demonstration sites for the first 'ODOW' foundations?

item.title: Wind industry slams watered down grids package after EU states' power grab
item.description: European wind group wants EU Parliament to restore stronger rules for grid and wind approvals that were removed by member states

item.title: Mingyang lands senior hire from Vestas in Europe
item.description: Corinna Brandt reveals she is moving to leading Chinese wind turbine supplier Mingyang, two months after sharing her last day at Denmark's Vestas

item.title: CIP and Siemens Gamesa big winners in Korean offshore wind auction
item.description: Record-breaking volume of bids submitted for Korean offshore wind auction, with almost 1.8GW of capacity awarded

item.title: UK 'to miss' 2030 clean power goal: here's what Burnham must do
item.description: Britain on course for five-year overshoot of flagship policy, says analyst group as interventionist new Prime Minister prepares to take over

item.title: Interactive map: The 16 projects chosen to help save UK wind power from itself
item.description: Bringing more battery storage and pumped hydro online will help cut down curtailment of wind farms, which damages the business case for renewable energy

item.title: Korean heavyweights submit winning bid in 800MW offshore wind tender
item.description: An announcement of the outcome of Korea's hugely oversubscribed national wind tender is also said to be imminent

item.title: Another US offshore wind developer falls as Trump buyouts shrink pipeline
item.description: North Carolina's Duke Energy's agreement raises the number of leases up for cancellation to nine, with $2.6bn in refunds committed by the administration

item.title: UK's likely next prime minister calls to safeguard domestic energy
item.description: UK could have a new prime minister in as little as three weeks

item.title: Envision expands German storage push despite regulatory uncertainty
item.description: Envision is the latest clean tech developer to bet on German battery storage market despite an uncertain grid connection and fee reform

item.title: Europe is swapping its fossil fuel dependence for vulnerable subsea infrastructure
item.description: Recent energy crises have made one thing clear: Europe's reliance on imported energy exposes it to strategic risk

item.title: Executive's move to top European wind developer falls through
item.description: Move to leading Eurorean offshore wind farm developer had been announced a matter of weeks ago but has now fallen through

item.title: European power giant sells US renewables portfolio after bidding war
item.description: French owned EDF agrees sale of its wind power and solar assets in North America to private equity group KKR

item.title: Timeline: How Siemens Gamesa blade shipment disaster unfolded
item.description: Nine wind turbine blades set for North Sea project were damaged when Fred Olsen Windcarrier suffered collision at Port of Esbjerg in Denmark

item.title: Deals of the Week: One offshore wind project scores three big deals
item.description: Biggest offshore wind project in German Baltic Sea sealed record power deal with Amazon along with two other deals

item.title: Equinor quits another offshore wind market after abandoning renewables target
item.description: Norwegian oil giant recently scrapped its target for wind and solar deployment and raised its bar for investing in new renewables projects

item.title: 'Why not copy Iberdrola?': RWE grids play makes sense, say experts
item.description: Regulated grid assets now appear more profitable than building new renewables generation, which is a problem for the energy transition, said experts at roundtable hosted by Recharge News in association with Zurich Resilience Solutions

item.title: Wind power in demand as corporate giants face new rules
item.description: Night-time wind to attract premium as companies adjust to new demands to match green power generation closely to consumption, says procurement specialist

item.title: Orsted defeats huge damages claim concerning Danish power unit
item.description: Offshore wind champion may have avoided hundreds of millions of dollars in compensation payments

item.title: Investigation: How Israel controversy rocked a European wind giant
item.description: Eleven insiders speak out over events that rocked Denmark's Ramboll, including a deputy-head in wind division wearing Israel Defence Forces (IDF) clothing to company townhall, work for a controversial Israeli renewable energy developer and pushback against new payroll provider

item.title: 'Unacceptable': Wind giant condemns manager who wore IDF clothing to townhall event
item.description: Senior manager at Ramboll who wore Israel Defence Forces (IDF) clothing to virtual townhall caused uproar at one of the wind industry’s biggest names

item.title: Turkey reveals offshore tender plan with return option for developers
item.description: Energy ministry also sets support price ceiling and allows for negative bidding under certain conditions

item.title: Europe losing ground on energy storage to China and US, says Barclays chief
item.description: Europe and UK don't have that same tradition of helping businesses scale up as in US and China, Barclays' head of transition finance says

item.title: California fights Trump offshore wind buyout scheme threatening US project pipeline
item.description: Top state law enforcement and energy officials file notice of intent to sue over Ocean Winds’ Golden State deal, with Invenergy’s similar lease exit also in the frame

item.title: Germany to reshuffle offshore wind sites to tackle wake effects
item.description: Maritime agency BSH kicks off process to amend site development plan, with increased focus on actual power yields and economic viability of offshore wind projects

item.title: RWE buys majority in Amprion, turning regulated grids into third growth pillar
item.description: Utility to reach 55% stake in Amprion through $4.1bn transaction financed by large capital increase; renewables expansion remains on track

item.title: Hormuz crisis hits 'world's largest' onshore wind farm under construction
item.description: US-Iran conflict throttling global oil & gas shipments spills into clean energy supply chains, with Chinese wind turbine giant forced to divert shipment
